retrieved_result: Happy Birthday, Prince! \"By Rolling Stone June 7, 2011Prince, one of the great icons of Eighties pop and beyond, turns 53 today. To celebrate the occasion, Rolling Stone is sharing a classic Prince cover story from the archives, a set of photo galleries documenting the singer's recent concerts in New York City and Los Ange

history.title: Happy Birthday, Prince!
history.description: "By Rolling Stone June 7, 2011Prince, one of the great icons of Eighties pop and beyond, turns 53 today. To celebrate the occasion, Rolling Stone is sharing a classic Prince cover story from the archives, a set of photo galleries documenting the singer's recent concerts in New York City and Los Ange
